FREE Consultation
Menu

Making Fertility Treatment
Affordable & Accessible
at NewLife Fertility Centre

Our team of fertility specialists is dedicated to providing personalized, compassionate care that’s as unique as your journey. With expert guidance and unwavering support, we’re here to help you navigate every step toward building the family you’ve always dreamed of, with sensitivity and understanding at every turn.

  • Highly experienced fertility specialists
  • Compassionate care and highly personalized treatments
  • Financially accessible with a State-of-the-art Facility

Contact Us

Focused On Your Journey

Your dream of a family is at the heart of everything we do. With leading fertility solutions and personalized care, we’re here to make that dream your reality.

Your Path To Parenthood

At NewLife Fertility, we understand that the journey to parenthood is deeply personal, and fertility challenges can feel overwhelming. For the past 20 years, NewLife Fertility has been dedicated to offering compassionate, personalized care, guiding you through every step of your fertility journey.

With advanced treatments and our fertility experts, our goal is to help you build the family you’ve always dreamed of. We’re here to offer hope, support, and the care you deserve as you navigate your fertility journey.

Start My Journey
Preserve my Fertility

Affordable Care Guaranteed

Cost-Effective Fertility Solutions Guaranteed

Exceptional & Personalized Care

Compassionate, Tailored Care For Each Individual

High Pregnancy Success Rate

Advances Treatments & Solutions

Leading Fertility Treatments & Services With Trusted Care

At NewLife Fertility, we honor your time, your journey, and your dreams. We understand that the path to parenthood is unique for each person, and we’re committed to providing the compassionate care and expert guidance you need. With a tailored approach to your individual needs, we empower you to navigate challenges with confidence and move closer to the family you’ve always dreamed of.

Our Services
Comprehensive Diagnostic & Care
Compassionate Approach

Take The First Step Towards Your Dream Of Parenthood

Embrace the excitement and trust that the future holds wonderful possibilities as you move closer to building your family. Your dream of becoming a parent starts now— you’re ready!

  • Personalized Care
  • Customized Plans
  • Comprehensive Support
  • Advanced Techniques
  • Holistic Approach
  • Expert Team

Dr. Samuel Soliman
MD, FRCSC, DABOG
Reproductive Endocrinology & Infertility

At NewLife Fertility Centre, our team of over 200 compassionate professionals is dedicated to guiding you through your fertility journey. With 10 convenient locations, we offer affordable fertility treatments tailored to your needs.

Our high pregnancy success rates reflect our commitment to providing personalized care in a safe, welcoming environment for individuals, couples, and 2SLGBTQI+ patients. Our experts work together to give you the best chance for a successful pregnancy.

We value the relationships we build with our patients and invite you to meet the team committed to your success

See All Doctors

Happy birth stories

We believe all families deserve comprehensive, whole-person care that supports their mental, physical, and emotional health needs

"This is to express our happiness, gratefulness, and thankfulness to you. Your reassurance and confidence brought us joy and peace of mind and no words can simply express our happiness and gratefulness to you; therefore you are truly a messenger of god to people… It is people like you that make it possible for people like us to be grateful and thankful to people like us. Thank you once again for everything."
Mr. and Mrs. Robert Gaiman
"Hi Dr. Soliman, Lisa, Shelly, Alma and Team, We are excited and tickled pink to announce the arrival of our daughter, E. She was born at 7:09 am on March 18 weighing 8 lbs 12 oz. She has stolen all of our hearts and is perfect in every way. I am dealing with a c section and it’s after effects, but that’s the life of a mom I guess. Thank you for helping to make our family complete."
Amanda Lorens
"We just wanted to say thank you to you and your staff….especially you and your IVF nurse Sarah Farlow. It was a long journey, but my husband and I could not be happier! Thank you for all your patience and time! Sarah…thank you so much for our talks and emails. You really helped me get through the process and sent me on my way."
Melinda and Rose Willams
"I wanted to let you know that I had my baby girl on September 28 at Oakville Hospital. We are doing very well. She weighed 6lb 5oz and was 50.5cm. Thank you for all that you have done for us and for never giving up on our dream to have children. I will bring her in within the next 3 months."
Mr. and Mrs. Salliwan
"I’d like to take this opportunity to say, “THANK-YOU!” Our little angel is due in November and we can’t wait to meet him. Without you and your staff, our lives would not be as joyous. I imagine there are many trying times in your profession. I hope this email brings some sunshine into your day."
Mrs. Shiva Radwani
"I gave birth to a beautiful baby girl, Ann*, on August 13th. She was full term and was born at 40 weeks and 3 days. Please tell Lucia that I will bring the baby to the office soon as she asked… Please let me know what days Dr. Soliman is in the office so I could thank him in person..I am attaching a picture of Ann."
Mrs. Linda Petterson
"I hereby acknowledge the help of me and my wife be able to realize our great dream to raise our family with two wonderful children, we are many happy and ruffles. I and my wife would like the Dr. Soliman had the pleasure of meeting my two boys Jeremiah and Jonathan Thank you from me and my wife."
David's happy parents

NewLife Fertility Centre is Canada’s leading fertility clinic, providing a wide variety of treatments such as egg freezing in Ontario, ranging from basic infertility care to the most advanced in vitro (IVF) technology available today.
